channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: NASA's 2 stuck astronauts take their first spacewalk together
item.description: NASA's two stuck astronauts are taking their first spacewalk together, exiting the International Space Station almost eight months after moving in.
item.dc:creator: Marcia Dunn, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg just teased next-gen Ray-Ban smart glasses – here are 4 things I want to see
item.description: Mark Zuckerberg has convinced me we’re getting next-gen Ray-Ban smart glasses this year – here are 4 things I want to see from them.
item.dc:creator: hamish.hector@futurenet.com (Hamish Hector), TechRadar

item.title: Mercadona apuesta en firme por la innovación con un Plan de Excelencia Digital
item.description: El gigante español del retail, Mercadona, redobla su apuesta por la innovación y la tecnología con vistas a eficientar la operativa interna y mejorar la experiencia del cliente.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: US cyber agency's future role in elections remains murky under the Trump administration
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The nation’s cybersecurity agency has played a critical role in helping states shore up the defenses of their voting systems, but its election mission appears uncertain amid sustained criticism from Republicans and key figures in the Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTINA A. CASSIDY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Sony Drops PSN Account Requirement for Some PC Games - TechRadar
item.description: Sony has announced it will be dropping the PlayStation Network account requirement for some PC versions of its games, starting with Marvel's Spider-Man 2 on January 30, 2025.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Browser Use: An open-source AI agent to automate web-based tasks
item.description: Author’s note: The generative AI revolution has sparked an explosion of open-source tools that fundamentally transform how developers build and deploy AI-powered applications.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: How execs can bridge the AI knowledge gap
item.description: From streamlining administrative tasks to enhancing brainstorming sessions, AI is becoming an essential workplace companion. Yet, despite its transformative promise, its integration isn’t as simple as flipping a switch.
item.dc:creator: Dave Grow, Fast Company

item.title: Amazon secretly tracked Californian consumers via cellphones, lawsuit alleges
item.description: Amazon.com was sued on Wednesday by consumers who accused the retailing giant of secretly tracking their movements through their cellphones, and selling data it collects.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Record levels of 'forever chemicals' found in wildlife near New Mexico base, hunters warned
item.description: Environmental regulators and health officials in New Mexico are warning hunters that harmful chemicals known to cause cancer in people have been found at record levels in birds, small mammals and plants at a lake near Holloman Air Force Base.
item.dc:creator: Susan Montoya Bryan, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Meta agrees to pay $25 million to settle lawsuit from Trump after Jan. 6 suspension
item.description: Meta has agreed to pay $25 million to settle a lawsuit filed by President Donald Trump against the company after it suspended his accounts following the Jan. 6, 2021, attack on the Capitol.
item.dc:creator: Zeke Miller And Aamer Madhani, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: How to make sure you’ve got the cybersecurity people you need
item.description: The government's personnel shop has devised a five-part strategy for planning, hiring and retaining cybersecurity people. But not everyone follows the strategy. The post How to make sure you’ve got the cybersecurity people you need first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: AI-assisted works can get copyright with enough human creativity, says US copyright office
item.description: An AI-assisted work could be copyrightable if an artist’s handiwork is perceptible. A human adapting an AI-generated output with “creative arrangements or modifications” could also make it fall under copyright protections.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Did DeepSeek copy ChatGPT to make new AI chatbot? Trump adviser thinks so
item.description: Did the upstart Chinese tech company DeepSeek copy ChatGPT to make the artificial intelligence technology that shook Wall Street this week? That's what ChatGPT maker OpenAI is suggesting, along with U.S. President Donald Trump's top AI adviser.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: IKEA refreshes super-cheap Bluetooth speaker that we love, as part of new series that will ‘reimagine’ home tech
item.description: IKEA has announced a new range of colorful home electronics –and it just launched two new colors of its Vappeby Bluetooth speaker as a taster.
item.dc:creator: mark.wilson@futurenet.com (Mark Wilson), TechRadar

item.title: How agentic AI is making everyone a data expert
item.description: IT service and operations teams increasingly benefit from the enrichment of their work systems with modern technology.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Every Marvel Easter egg and reference in Your Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man episodes 1 and 2: Nico Minoru, Lonnie Lincoln, and more
item.description: Your Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man's first two episodes are out now – here are all of the Marvel references I found.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: La IA está lista para renovar la experiencia del cliente
item.description: La inteligencia artificial (IA) está preparada para hacerse cargo del recorrido del cliente para una amplia gama de productos en los próximos cinco años. Los CIO que ignoren la tendencia corren el riesgo de perder terreno frente a la competencia, advierten los expertos en IA y marketing.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Don’t be so quick to click that Google Calendar invite. It could be a hacker’s trap
item.description: A phishing campaign uses Google Calendar to schedule fake meeting invitations that appear legitimate, redirecting targets to phishing sites.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How Satya Nadella is weathering the storm of Trump’s first days
item.description: It’s going to be a long four years for Microsoft as the company tries to navigate the stormy chaos and pledges of retribution that follow wherever President Donald J. Trump’s mind wanders.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Trump’s 100% tariff threat on Taiwan chips raises cost, supply chain fears
item.description: President Donald Trump has suggested plans to impose tariffs of up to 100% on semiconductors imported from Taiwan, aiming to boost US manufacturing but risking higher costs and supply chain disruptions for tech firms and enterprises.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Linux gets support for the Copilot key
item.description: There is a special Copilot key on some Windows laptops that can be used to launch Microsoft’s AI assistant — and now support for the key is coming to Linux.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Sweden seizes vessel suspected of 'sabotage' after undersea data cable rupture in Baltic Sea
item.description: RIGA, Latvia (AP) — Swedish prosecutors announced Sunday night that they have opened a preliminary investigation into suspected aggravated “sabotage” and ordered the detention of a vessel in the Baltic Sea suspected of damaging an underwater fiber optic cable connecting Latvia and the Swedish island
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Families sue TikTok in France over teen suicides they say are linked to harmful content
item.description: CASSIS, France (AP) — In the moment when her world shattered three years ago, Stephanie Mistre found her 15-year-old daughter, Marie, lifeless in the bedroom where she died by suicide.
item.dc:creator: TOM NOUVIAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Meta to invest up to $65B in AI infrastructure, develop an ‘AI engineer’ agent
item.description: Not to be outdone by its close rival OpenAI, Meta has announced its plans to spend $60 to $65 billion on AI infrastructure this year, and is building a data center almost as big as Manhattan.
item.dc:creator: Network World
